description: Class-based resource management. riskyUsage skips close() on throw; safeUsage uses try/finally.

expected.notes: fp.close() skipped when fp.process() throws in riskyUsage; scanner may not track class-based resource lifecycle
TP: fs.openSync resource at line 7 can leak if process() throws and close() is never called (e.g., in riskyUsage)
TP: fs.openSync resource at line 7 has a possible leak path when exceptions bypass close() [per-body: sensitivity change]
